programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens must record lyrics and learn choreography as they perform in a tale on social media; choreographer Jamal Sims guest judges; Anne Hathaway makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in the Snatch Game; LGBT activist Ts Madison guest judges.

programme.desc: It's Freaky Friday and the queens must turn each other into their own drag doppelgangers; Loni Love ("Soul Plane") guest judges; psychic Char Margolis makes an appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must create and brand their own versions of extravagant soft drinks; current reigning superstar Jaida Essence Hall makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens take part in a comedy roast of former "Miss Congeniality" winners Heidi N Closet, Nina West and Valentina; a guest appearance by Norvina (Instant Influencer).

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.sub-title: Henny, I Shrunk the Drag Queens
programme.desc: The queens flex their acting skills in a new sci-fi adventure, playing tiny shrunken drag queens; Cynthia Erivo ("Genius: Aretha"); Scarlett Johansson ("Black Widow") makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.desc: The queens create and star in commercials for new drag-themed dating apps; music artist Courtney Love and actor Nico Tortorella guest judge.

programme.desc: The queens have to produce and host their very own Drag Con panels on makeup, hair and body; husband and wife duo behind the Oscar nominated film, "The Big Sick," Kumail Nanjiani and Emily Gordon, guest judge.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack catches married Mr. Angelino with a woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's new moustache is a turn-on for Terri.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former Navy buddy visits Jack and tries to con his way into a partnership at the bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet and Terri try to raise money for Jack.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's girlfriend asks him to father her child.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.sub-title: She Loves Me, She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Jack thinks one of the girls is interested in him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack accidentally receives $1,000 from an automatic teller machine.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack tries to retrieve his nasty note to a critic.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack tries to keep his girlfriend's job a secret.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Iola, Bubba and Mama fantasize about marriage after attending a wedding. Guest star: Joseph Campanella.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Uncle Oscar's talking parrot tells the family of a hidden treasure.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama leads a senior-citizens' tap-dancing troupe.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama appears on the "Jeopardy!" game show and wins a trip to Hawaii.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Surprises and romance await the Harpers in Hawaii.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama, vacationing in Hawaii, plans to avoid the man she saved from drowning.

programme.desc: The queens give some of today's hottest social media superstars drag makeovers; actor Miles Heizer ("13 Reasons Why") and hip-hop artist Lizzo guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must present two characters on the runway: their best selves and their evil twins; Lena Dunham and singer Ashanti guest judge; Cheyenne Jackson is a special guest.
